_comment: SoundPound recording devices. The current device (state.gear.device) drives the DAW: track count, max song length (bars), which mixer effects are available, and FIDELITY (which feeds song quality → show payouts). tape tiers are lo-fi; digital tiers unlock more. Buy upgrades at the pawn shop. Prices in $.

devices.name: SoundPound 400
devices.desc: A battered 4-track cassette recorder. Warm, lo-fi, no frills. You start with this.

devices.name: SoundPound 800
devices.desc: 8 tracks of tape. Room to layer a real arrangement.

devices.name: SoundPound 1200
devices.desc: Goes digital. 12 tracks, full 10-band EQ, cleaner sound.

devices.name: SoundPound 1600
devices.desc: 16 tracks, pristine fidelity. The big leagues.
